message:
fix(transcriptParser): relax section header regex for whitespace flexibility

The section header regex was too strict, requiring exactly one space between
the `##` and the section number, and exactly one space after the period.

Changed from: /^## (\d+)\. (.+)$/
Changed to:   /^##\s+(\d+)\.\s+(.+)$/

This allows:
- Multiple spaces after ##: "##  1. Title"
- Multiple spaces after period: "## 1.  Title"
- Combinations: "##  1.  Title"

This improves robustness when parsing markdown that may have inconsistent
whitespace formatting, which is common in manually edited documents.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
